temporal_description: A medium shot captures three men standing in a dimly lit, green-hued room. In the center, an older man with short, graying hair and a worried expression wears a light-colored suit jacket. To his right, a younger man in a black shirt looks down with a somber face. Behind them, a third man with a mustache and dark hair stands slightly out of focus. The background consists of a wall with a wavy, metallic grid pattern. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters are visible. The camera remains static, focusing on the tense interaction between the central and right-hand figures. The audio opens with a low, tense, and atmospheric musical score, creating a feeling of suspense and unease. The younger man turns his head to look at the older man, his expression shifting to one of concern. A man speaks in a low, serious voice, addressing someone with a tone of concern and respect, "陈哥" (Chén gē). Another man replies curtly and dismissively, "走开" (Zǒu kāi), telling him to move away. The dialogue is brief and cut short by a loud, sharp, and violent crashing sound, like something heavy being slammed or broken. The camera cuts to a close-up, shaky shot of a hand, presumably the younger man's, as it forcefully smashes an object on a surface. The impact shatters the object, sending white, powdery fragments flying. The background is dark and indistinct, maintaining the moody, green color palette of the scene. The white Chinese characters remain in the top left corner.
